title: Seven Economic Challenges For Donald Trump
section_path: Seven Economic Challenges For Donald Trump
section_path_text: Seven Economic Challenges For Donald Trump
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know ahead of today's Presidential inauguration
Once in office, Mr Trump will face higher inflationary pressures, a jittery bond market, a debt ceiling negotiation and an obligation to roll a large part of US debt. Trade wars and a thin House majority may accentuate all of the above. Equity and bond markets celebrated slightly better than expected core CPI inflation numbers out of the US.
